title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Ambuja Cements

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Ambuja Cements
jsonLd.description:
Ambuja Cements is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!
